reasoning: I voted this way in 2019 and nothing has changed my mind. The ration card works. The hospital card works. Didi's government is the one running Bengal, the one that puts these things in my hand every month. Shantanu babu talks about citizenship papers and big things from Delhi, but he does not run my state anymore—and promises about tomorrow do not matter when I hold something real in my hand today. I will not throw away what I have.
primary_drivers: The welfare cards (Khadya Sathi, Swasthya Sathi) are given and maintained by the AITC state government
Practical daily security matters more than political promises or religious/community appeals
Incumbent party has proven capacity to deliver, while Shantanu represents promises and abstract politics
